name: Peanut Butter Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Mix together the flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda in a large bowl.
3. Cream the shortening and peanut butter until creamy.
4. Gradually add sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs, beating well.
6. Stir in the dry ingredients alternately with the mashed bananas, mixing until just combined.
7. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan.
8. Bake for 1 hour.
